name: panic_retreat_and_block
description: Emergency survival action for low health: sprint directly away from the nearest hostile cluster while avoiding allied players, keep facing threats, and when oak planks or other placeable blocks are available place blocks behind or between the bot and approaching hostiles to break pathing. Stop only after reaching at least 12 blocks separation from all visible hostiles or after the time limit; do not melee during this action.
parameters: z.object({ preferredDistanceBlocks: z.number().min(4).max(64).default(12).describe("Stop retreating once every visible hostile is at least this many blocks away"), retreatBlocks: z.number().min(2).max(48).default(14).describe("How far ahead to set each retreat pathing goal, in blocks, away from the hostile cluster"), maxDurationTicks: z.number().int().min(1).max(1200).default(180).describe("Maximum active Minecraft time to keep retreating, measured in game ticks where 20 ticks is about 1 active second"), minimumHealth: z.number().min(0).max(20).default(0).describe("Do not start if bot health is at or below this value; use 0 to allow any living health"), avoidPlayers: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to add repulsion away from nearby player entities while choosing retreat direction"), hostileSearchRadiusBlocks: z.number().min(4).max(96).default(32).describe("Radius in blocks for hostile entities that should influence the panic retreat"), playerAvoidRadiusBlocks: z.number().min(1).max(24).default(5).describe("Player avoidance radius in blocks when avoidPlayers is enabled"), placeBlocks: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to place available solid blocks between the bot and approaching hostiles while retreating"), blockItemPreference: z.string().min(1).default("oak_planks").describe("Preferred solid block item name to place first, for example oak_planks"), maxBlocksToPlace: z.number().int().min(0).max(32).default(10).describe("Maximum number of blocks this emergency action may place before stopping block placement"), blockPlacementIntervalMs: z.number().int().min(100).max(3000).default(650).describe("Minimum active milliseconds between block placement attempts") })
